case.title: GALVESTON, H & S A R CO v. STATE OF TEXAS

opinion.h: GALVESTON, H & S A R CO v. STATE OF TEXAS, 177 U.S. 103 (1899)
GALVESTON, HARRISBURG, & SAN ANTONIO RAILWAY COMPANY et al., Plffs. in Err., v. STATE OF TEXAS. No. 82.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: This involves precisely the same questions that have just been determined in the foregoing case, and the same judgment will therefore be entered.
